page.title: Production Cost, Instantly
page.description: Pick your profession, find your recipe. Required materials, craft time, XP gained and total weight — all in one view.

search.resultEmpty: No matches — shorten the term or pick another profession.

calc.title: Recipe Details
calc.subtitle: Pick a recipe; ingredients, sub-recipes and totals open here.
calc.pickAnItem: Click a recipe in the list
calc.noRecipe: No recipe found in the database for this product.
calc.subRecipeNote: This material has its own recipe

rawChain.title: Raw Material Totals
rawChain.subtitle: Drilling through every sub-recipe, here's how many raw materials you actually need.
rawChain.empty: No sub-recipes here — the list above is already raw.

xp.title: XP Planner
xp.subtitle: Pick a profession, set current/target level, toggle your buffs, list your inventory — we'll show the fastest path.
xp.fastestNote: Highest XP-per-second recipe — buffs and workbench count factored in.
xp.noRecipes: No recipes available in this level range.
xp.modelNote: * Approximate. The XP curve may change between seasons.
xp.workbenchHint: How many workbenches you can run in parallel (multiplies throughput).

region.label: Altar region
region.hint: In red zones altars grant +50% each; in blue zones home altar +40% and clan altar +60%.

xp.searchAllHint: When on, the optimizer scans every profession for the best fit to your inventory.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: What raw materials do you have? List them here — the optimizer ranks recipes around them.
inventory.empty: No materials added yet. Add some and the optimizer kicks in.

optimizer.title: Suggested Recipes
optimizer.subtitle: Recipes you can craft right now with what you have — sorted by XP per hour.
optimizer.noResults: Nothing in this profession can be made with your current materials. Add more or change profession.
optimizer.addInventoryFirst: Add materials to your inventory to enable the optimizer.
optimizer.almostHint: Gather a bit more and these recipes open up.

character.title: Power Cards and Skill Stones
character.subtitle: Quinfall powers your character through two systems: permanent power cards lift core stats like HP/MP/attack/defense, while skill stones slot into an active ability and amplify it.

powerCards.intro: Power cards slot into character panels. Each card scales from Tier D up to S; high-tier cards unlock stronger passives.

skillStones.intro: Skill stones slot into active abilities to amplify them. Low quality is for the early game; top quality is the bedrock of every endgame build.
